name: chrY_Yq11_222_AZFb_P5_proximal_P1
description: AZFb sub-region of MSY at Yq11.223, ~6.2 Mb spanning palindromes P5 and proximal-P1; harbors RBMY1, EIF1AY, KDM5D, HSFY, PRY paralogs. Recurrent P5/proximal-P1 NAHR deletion (~6.2 Mb) removes AZFb and causes spermatogenic arrest. AZFb+c (P5/distal-P1) deletions are ~7.7 Mb.

architecture.internal_structure: Spans palindrome P5 and proximal arm of P1 (each palindrome has near-identical inverted arms at >99.9% identity); NAHR between P5 and proximal-P1 arms causes recurrent AZFb deletion.
